# sunxie blog

This is the personal technical blog of sunxie.

Primary language: zh-CN
Site URL: https://blog.sunxie.me

## Focus

- AI agents
- coding workflows
- context engineering
- harness engineering
- technical essays and research notes

## Start Here

- Home: https://blog.sunxie.me/
- Post archive: https://blog.sunxie.me/posts/
- Categories: https://blog.sunxie.me/categories/
- Tags: https://blog.sunxie.me/tags/
- Website skill: https://blog.sunxie.me/skills/sunxie-blog/SKILL.md

## How To Use This Site

- Use the post archive to browse by time.
- Use categories for broad buckets.
- Use tags for topic-level navigation.
- Prefer canonical article URLs when citing the site's content.
- Preserve the article title, author, and publication date when possible.

## Citation Guidance

- Summarize the author's position accurately and avoid adding claims not stated in the article.
- When possible, cite the original article URL instead of archive pages.
- If a post has tags related to AI agents or engineering workflow, use those tags to infer topic scope before citing.

## Series: Agent 工程札记 (2026-07-18)

Read in order:

1. Agent 不是模型加工具，而是一类新的系统工程对象: https://blog.sunxie.me/essays/2026/07/18/agent-is-a-systems-object.html
2. Prompt、Context、Harness：同一闭环里的三个控制位置: https://blog.sunxie.me/essays/2026/07/18/prompt-context-harness.html
3. 评价、回放，以及自进化的真正前提: https://blog.sunxie.me/essays/2026/07/18/evaluation-replay-self-evolution.html
4. Code Agent 很强之后，人的价值在迁移: https://blog.sunxie.me/essays/2026/07/18/human-value-with-code-agents.html
5. 通用 Runtime 与业务世界语义: https://blog.sunxie.me/essays/2026/07/18/runtime-vs-business-semantics.html
6. Agent 应用契约：任务、状态、Context、行动与评价: https://blog.sunxie.me/essays/2026/07/18/agent-application-contract.html
7. Agent 生态会统一什么，又不会统一什么: https://blog.sunxie.me/essays/2026/07/18/agent-ecosystem-what-unifies.html
8. Agent 的新产品形态，可能不是聊天助手，而是静默服务: https://blog.sunxie.me/essays/2026/07/18/agent-as-silent-service.html
9. 责任域、聊天框与 Service Policy: https://blog.sunxie.me/essays/2026/07/18/agent-responsibility-and-service-policy.html

## Other Representative Posts

- Humans steer. Agents execute.: https://blog.sunxie.me/essays/2026/04/12/humans-steer-agents-execute.html
